title: Light And Shadow
description: Port Light Block and add Shadow Block
body:
Use Light Block for lighting invisibly, and Shadow Block to obscure light.

![Light for dark area](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b80717b5723db195d39ecf00e63264db3ed42a5a.png)

![Shadow for bright area (Invisible)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df4ec2a31ded8ccd0f8d3f6a9344181dcb0d8e20_0.webp)

![Shadow for bright area (Visible)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eeb39d82464d7f374e7e2b3e2f3cba700d64210_0.webp)

# Notes :  

This is a both(client and server)-side mod.  
Feel free to use this mod in any modpacks.
